hero.subheading: A high-intent acquisition system engineered to convert search demand into qualified financing applications at scale.

background.title: Scaling Real Estate Financing
description: Rent Buy It faced high acquisition costs and inconsistent lead quality. Ideom implemented a full-funnel system aligning paid acquisition, qualification, and conversion to drive predictable growth.
The goal was to transform underperforming paid channels into a high-conversion acquisition engine that filtered leads before they reached the sales team, maximizing both volume and quality.
background.quote: Ideom helped us turn traffic into qualified applications at scale. The efficiency gains changed everything.

challenges.title: Quality over Quantity
description: Extremely high cost per lead from broad-match keywords and non-optimized social campaigns.
Low lead-to-application conversion rate due to lack of a qualification stage.
Inefficient funnel structure causing significant drop-off at the financing verification stage.
Inability to scale ad spend without an exponential increase in CPA.

solutions.title: The High-Intent Funnel
description: Rebuilt paid search campaigns around high-intent long-tail keywords tied to home financing urgency.
Introduced a multi-step qualification funnel that filters non-qualified leads before they enter the CRM.
Optimized landing pages with clear, upfront eligibility criteria to reduce friction and bounce rates.
Created a unified messaging path from ad click to final application, increasing trust and completion rates.

emailSequence.title: Campaign Architecture
description: 1. Search Intent: Captured users actively looking for 'Rent to Own' solutions in high-value zones.
2. Belief Shifting: Used Meta ads to address 'Perfect Credit' limiting beliefs and open new financing paths.
3. Qualification Filter: A step-based application flow that improved lead quality by 10x.
4. The Result: A scalable acquisition engine that reduced CPL by 42% while increasing application volume.

thoughtProcess.title: The strategic playbook
content: In alternative financing, relevance is the most expensive variable.
We didn't just want more leads; we wanted more pre-qualified applications. Our strategy focused on 'Intent Capture' rather than broad reach.
By implementing a qualification filter earlier in the user journey, we increased the 'value-per-click' significantly, allowing for higher ad spend with better bottom-line results.
The result was a 144% increase in overall conversion rate and a predictable $640K in growth over 9 months.

emails.label: Google Search: Intent Capture
explanation: Focused on 'struggling with mortgage' and 'rent-to-own' high-intent long-tail keywords.
Used direct-response headlines that offered an immediate alternative to traditional banks.
Tightly matched ad copy to regional eligibility requirements.
Delivered the highest 'intent-to-apply' scores across the entire project.

emails.label: Meta: Alternative Financing
explanation: Showcased real family success stories to build emotional trust and authority.
Targeted lookalike audiences based on high-performing qualified applicants.
Reduced the 'credit fear' barrier by leading with low-friction eligibility messaging.
Generated massive top-of-funnel volume at a 42% lower cost than previous benchmarks.

emails.label: Application Flow: The filter
explanation: A 3-step qualification system that removed the need for manual vetting.
Mobile-first design optimized for high-speed completion.
Integrated real-time eligibility feedback to keep users engaged through the flow.
Lifted total application completion rate by 144% compared to the original form.

results.label: Lower CPL
results.desc: Reduction in cost per qualified lead.

results.label: Lead Flow
results.desc: Scale in qualified applications without cost creep.

testimonials.quote: Ideom helped us turn traffic into qualified applications at scale. The efficiency gains changed everything.
